queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis investigates the impact of having no checking account on the reduction of credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Statistical analysis investigates the impact of the requested credit amount on the contribution to increased credit risk.
Credit risk research investigates the influence of loan duration in months on the likelihood of credit default.
